judgeReasoning: The response acknowledges llms.txt as a website artifact and AGENTS.md as package-contained, but fails to mention the critical technical details: llms.txt uses absolute URLs (making it wrong inside a tarball because nothing looks for it in node_modules) and AGENTS.md works offline thanks to relative links. It also omits that --bundle skips llms-full.txt, only naming llms.txt and robots.txt. These omissions cause it to fall short of the required rubric points.
